Off Calendar May-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion To 1) Compel Defts' Responses To Pltf'S For Interrogatories And Requests For Document Production; And 2) Award Monetary Sanctions Against Defts And Their Consel
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF BP WEST COAST PRODUCTS LLC's Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories And Requests For Document Production is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $895, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
